pacing_curve.note: Routine orders; the wrongness is only a rumor the patrol hasn't met.
Standard wartime peril; nothing unnatural yet.
The abandonment is wrong; guns turned inward signal something is off.
Signs of panicked retreat deepen the unease.
The massacre and the shaft crystallize the threat.
The sound closing in confirms the threat is animate.
Desperate physical escape; tension held below the pursuit climax.
Sustained siege; the entity's nature is laid bare.
Decisive action; survival hinges on the chosen option.
Tension releases but the horror stage holds — the disaster is revealed, not resolved.
